overall.description: Spider-Man crouched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like intersection in a video game. The scene features dense traffic, crowds of pedestrians, and towering buildings covered in bright digital billboards under clear afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major commercial intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched in a predatory stance on the building ledge, overlooking the busy street below with minimal movement

entered.detail: tall glass building with concrete ledge where Spider-Man is perched, featuring reflective windows
large red digital billboards with animated advertisements mounted on building facades
modern skyscraper with glass curtain wall and purple signage visible on lower floors
multi-lane city street filled with moving traffic including yellow taxis and various vehicles
zebra crossing markings on the street with numerous pedestrians walking

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man maintains a stationary crouched position on a high-rise building ledge, surveilling a vibrant urban canyon resembling Times Square. The view encompasses a busy multi-lane avenue filled with dense traffic and pedestrians, flanked by towering glass skyscrapers adorned with massive digital billboards under bright afternoon sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, high-angle perspective from a skyscraper ledge overlooking a vibrant, sun-drenched urban canyon. It begins with Spider-Man in a stationary crouched position, surveilling the bustling intersection below. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses a multi-lane avenue teeming with dense traffic and crowds of pedestrians. The scene then expands to reveal the scale of the surrounding glass skyscrapers, which are adorned with massive, glowing digital billboards under the bright afternoon sunlight.
